name: @atlassian/opsgenie
description: Create, manage, and resolve alerts and incidents with priority levels, responders, and rich metadata. Configure on-call schedules with rotations and overrides, and query who is currently on-call. Define escalation policies to notify responders in order when alerts go unacknowledged. Manage teams, users, services, and integrations. Set up per-user notification rules with contact method preferences. Receive webhook notifications for alert activity such as creation, acknowledgment, and closure.
